CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiffs Frank Figoni And Athena Nazarios Attendance At An Independent Psychiatric Examination
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Douglas Saeltzer, Esq., (415) 981-7210, appearing for Frank Figoni and Athena Nazario, Plaintiff
Andrea R. Murphy, Esq., (415) 278-9400 ext. 123, appearing for Yan Kam Yu,Defendant

ARGUED. Ms. Murphy argued that there is good faith for a second independent medical examination and provided case background. The Court questioned why wasn't a full psychological exam done? Ms. Murphy stated that the scope of the doctor was to evaluate the cognitive impairment and neurological exam. Mr. Saeltzer argued against a second exam of his clients and reported that Dr. Conwiner did not comply with recording of the examinations. Ms. Murphy argued that Mr. Figoni forgot to have his examination recorded until the last 45 minutes and that Ms. Nazario's full exam was recorded.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT KAM YAN Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiffs Frank Figoni And Athena Nazarios Attendance At An Independent Psychiatric Examination is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiffs Frank Figoni And Athena Nazarios Attendance At An Independent Psychiatric Examination
Off Calendar Nov-23-2020 Continued To Dec-02-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Doris Cheng of the law offices of Walkup Melodia et al (Tel: 415.981.7210) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Andrea R. Murphy of the law offices of PHILLIPS, SPALLAS & ANGSTADT, LLP (Tel: 415.278.9400) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

Defendant declines to stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. Defendant's counsel to submit new notice, including background, diagnostic information to the judge pro tem and opposing counsel no later than close of business on November 24, 2020. Plaintiff counsel may respond no later than close of business on Friday, November 27, 2020.

DEFENDANT KAM YAN'S Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiffs Frank Figoni And Athena Nazarios Attendance At An Independent Psychiatric Examination is CONTINUED to December 02, 2020 at 9:30 AM in Housing Department 501. Judge Pro Tem Renne to submit report/recommendation by November 29, 2020.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne: Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
